name: nightigerxo Drum Kit
author: nightiger
description: contains: 185 serum presets (yes, will work for any DAW, you just need the Serum or Serum 2 VST plugin), 32 zip project files, including 007 and naples (my best selling beats), 64 bass plucks/basses (w/ unique digicore plucks!!), 58 hi-hats/open hats (+ 34 midi's), 68 claps/snares (+ 10 midi's), 36 kicks (+ 6 midi's), 29 percs/vox, 76 transitions/sfx (w/ downbeats set in edison so u don't have to align them to the grid in fl studio!!), my pink FL theme, melody & chord midi's (FL 24+ only because .fsc), 21 perc loops, few extra sounds and my producer tags including YOU'RE NOW LISTENING TO TI-TI-TIGER RADIOO :33.
